task_completion.description: Verify that the Garmin BaseCamp application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Garmin BaseCamp application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'My Collection' or the specific Bellevue Fells trail data list is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left-hand Library pane of BaseCamp, 'My Collection' or the specific trail data list is highlighted or selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the original waypoint 'BELLEVUE' is located.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The waypoint named 'BELLEVUE' is visible in the bottom-left data pane or on the map view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the waypoint name is being edited.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog box for the waypoint is open, or the waypoint name in the list is highlighted in an editable text field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the waypoint has been successfully renamed to 'Bellevue Parking'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The waypoint previously known as 'BELLEVUE' now appears exactly as 'Bellevue Parking' in the data list, properties window, or on the map.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to rename the waypoint, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like `sed`, `awk`, or python scripts modifying the .gpx file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred within the actual Garmin BaseCamp application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Garmin BaseCamp (Library pane, map view, data pane) and not a generic text editor or different GIS software.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply open the GPX file in a text editor to change the XML tag.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad, VS Code, Vim, or Nano) are open showing the raw XML/GPX data with the <name> tag being manually edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target waypoint is originally named 'BELLEVUE' and is part of the Bellevue Fells trail data (fells_loop.gpx) located in 'My Collection'. The task must be completed within the Garmin BaseCamp application interface. The final expected name for the waypoint is exactly 'Bellevue Parking'.
